obligations.action: Ensure intraday borrowings are availed only for permitted purposes: unitholder pay-outs, investment pay-ins, MTM obligations, foreign exchange settlements, and repayment of existing borrowings.
obligations.evidence: Borrowing transaction logs and scheme-wise utilization records

obligations.action: Limit the quantum of intraday borrowings to guaranteed receivables, sighted non-guaranteed receivables, or additional amounts solely for meeting redemption and other unitholder pay-outs under Regulation 42(1).
obligations.evidence: Daily borrowing limit monitoring reports and receivable tracking sheets

obligations.action: Repay all intraday borrowings by the end of the day, and ensure any conversions to overnight borrowings are within regulatory limits and permitted purposes under Regulation 42(1).
obligations.evidence: End-of-day bank statements and borrowing position reports

obligations.action: Formulate and obtain approval from the Boards of AMC and Trustees for the policy on the use of intraday borrowing facility, including approval processes and monitoring mechanisms.
obligations.evidence: Board and Trustee approved policy document and meeting minutes

obligations.action: Publish the approved intraday borrowing policy on the website of the AMC.
obligations.evidence: Website screenshot and live URL of the published policy

obligations.action: Maintain scheme-wise records detailing the underlying liquidity mismatch and the expected source of repayment for each intraday borrowing.
obligations.evidence: Scheme-wise borrowing registers and liquidity mismatch reports

obligations.action: Ensure compliance with clauses 6 and 7 of the Fourth Schedule of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026, and para 17.7 of the Master Circular.
obligations.evidence: Compliance audit reports and internal checklists

obligations.action: Ensure that the cost of intraday borrowing and any loss or cost incurred due to unforeseen events or delays in receiving funds from receivables are borne entirely by the AMC.
obligations.evidence: Scheme expense ledgers and AMC financial statements showing absorption of borrowing costs
